name: Golden Embroidered Net Saree
description: Bright yellow net saree with silver embellishments, perfect for Haldi or sangeet functions.
stylistNotes: Add silver jewellery and floral gajra for a charming festive vibe.
materialCare: Steam iron only. Handle with care due to embroidery.

name: Off-white Floral Organza Saree
description: Lightweight off-white organza saree with pastel floral prints and a soft border.
stylistNotes: Ideal for daytime events with pearl accessories and minimal makeup.
materialCare: Hand wash gently or dry clean.

name: Maroon Wedding Banarasi Saree
description: Rich maroon Banarasi saree with antique gold zari weaving, ideal for bridal functions.
stylistNotes: Perfect for weddings with heavy bridal jewellery and bun hairstyle.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in muslin wrap.

name: Light Pink Silk Saree
description: Vibrant blue silk saree with intricate golden work and a traditional pallu.
stylistNotes: Best paired with a contrast blouse and gold jewellery set.

name: Royal Pink Silk Saree
description: Elegant pink silk saree with golden zari border, ideal for weddings and festive occasions.
stylistNotes: Pair with antique gold jewellery and bangles for a complete ethnic look.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Do not bleach or machine wash.
